label: Decision Digest
description: Summarize the last 30 days of the Nexis decision log: themes, the 5 most consequential calls, open loops.
prompt: Read the decision log at C:/Users/qubit/OneDrive/Documents/Automations/Nexis/decisions/log.md. Write a crisp digest of the entries from the most recent 30 days: group them by theme, call out the 5 most consequential decisions with their dates, and end with any open loops or contradictions you notice. Output pure markdown (start with a # title), no preamble, no questions.

label: Skills Health
description: Inventory every Nexis skill from SKILL.md frontmatter and flag weak or missing descriptions.
prompt: Using Grep on C:/Users/qubit/OneDrive/Documents/Automations/Nexis/.claude/skills/*/SKILL.md, extract each skill's name and description from frontmatter (one Grep for 'name:' and one for 'description:' with file paths is enough — do not read every file). Produce a markdown report: total skill count, a table of skill -> one-line purpose, and a final section flagging any skill with a missing, vague, or duplicated description. Markdown only, no preamble.

label: Brain Pulse
description: Check the second brain's wiki coverage and suggest the next ingest priorities.
prompt: Read C:/Users/qubit/OneDrive/Documents/agency-brain/CRITICAL_FACTS.md and C:/Users/qubit/OneDrive/Documents/agency-brain/wiki/index.md, then skim 2-3 wiki pages that look most important. Write a short 'brain pulse' report: what the wiki currently covers well, which pages look stale or thin, and 3 concrete suggestions for the next brain-sync ingest. Markdown only, no preamble.
